text: - Material Safety Data Sheets . GS Construction Mountain, LLC will make available at the jobsite  (or  immediately  available)  a  MSDS  for  every  hazardous  chemical  on  site. Management reviews incoming MSDS's for new and significant health/safety information, and, if necessary, this information is passed on to affected employees and all subcontractors on  site  before  the  hazardous  chemical  is  used.  If  an  MSDS  is  missing  or  obviously incomplete, management  requests  a  new  MSDS  from  the  supplier  or  manufacturer. Management notes on the inventory form the date the MSDS was requested and received.
